case_title: DUBOFF, STEWART DBA VAL-PAK OF SAN FRANCISCO VS ALTERNATIVE MUSIC SORCE INCBDA ROUGH TRADE RECORDS

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALTERNATIVE MUSIC SORCE INCBDA ROUGH TRADE RECORDS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $880.00 FILED BY DUBOFF, STEWART DBA VAL-PAK OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ALTERNATIVE MUSIC SORCE INCBDA ROUGH TRADE RECORDS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUBOFF, STEWART DBA VAL-PAK OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALTERNATIVE MUSIC SORCE INCBDA ROUGH TRADE RECORDS $880.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $895.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
